query: at the top of top_k, throw `std::invalid_argument("k must be non-negative")` when k is negative. <stdexcept> is already included. Do not touch anything else.

add a free function `std::string format_top_k(const std::vector<int>& input, int k, const std::string& sep)` that returns the top_k results joined by sep (e.g. {5,2,9,1}, k=2, sep="," -> "9,5"). The implementation of format_top_k MUST use std::for_each to build the string — not a range-based for loop or std::accumulate. Include <string> and <sstream>.
